title: Mike's Furniture
description: Custom furniture made by Mike! If the placement looks possible, it probably is!
body:
# ![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/8SWfJOlR/images/b9881f5b9ced46979f9beb4c9902d22d0544b895.png)

I simply wanted a bit more of my own custom furniture in the game so I did just that!

My goal with this furniture is basically "If it looks possible, it should be possible". You can bend and merge the couches in all sorts of ways.
There is even a "Wand" item you can craft, this debugs the couch into all possible states!

![Base Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/8SWfJOlR/images/31d0196b55819964f5cda663b69ef6f96056b636.jpeg)

Currently I have only added the following items (in all colors):
- Couch
- Chase
- Lamp

I plan to add a lot more, whenever I find the motivation or time to do so. Check out my discord for any updates!

#

More Exteme Examples:
![Exteme Example 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/8SWfJOlR/images/8f7f05085b18de526aca9082f2c19f8bd3ae562d.jpeg)
![Extreme Example 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/8SWfJOlR/images/236c6ed815cc336cc64ca5d6be7e976d58405647.jpeg)
